_comment: SYNTHETIC sample manifest for the MIMIC ETL (#68). Fake data only -- NO real MIMIC content (DUA). Shows the schema the curator fills from the real cohort. Study ids/subject ids are invented.

studies.report_text: FINDINGS: The lungs are clear. Heart size normal. No effusion or pneumothorax. IMPRESSION: No acute cardiopulmonary process.
INDICATION: Rule out pneumothorax post line placement. FINDINGS: Small right apical pneumothorax. IMPRESSION: Small right apical pneumothorax; recommend follow-up.
FINDINGS: Moderate right pleural effusion with adjacent atelectasis. IMPRESSION: Moderate right pleural effusion.
